testcase.name: test_add_record_with_color_variant

failure.message: AssertionError: color_variant not returned: {'id': '8168adb4-7c32-4586-91f4-80aff9d17299', 'discogs_id': None, 'title': 'TEST_B30_8802b0_Reality_Album', 'artist': 'TEST_B30_8802b0_Artist', 'cover_url': None, 'year': 2024, 'format': 'Vinyl', 'notes': None, 'color_variant': None, 'user_id': '63dcf386-b4aa-4061-9333-99adc0a770bd', 'created_at': '2026-03-09T20:48:37.430398+00:00', 'spin_count': 0} assert None == 'Limited Edition Blue Marble'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_block30_context_add_button.py:80: in test_add_record_with_color_variant assert data["color_variant"] == "Limited Edition Blue Marble", f"color_variant not returned: {data}" E AssertionError: color_variant not returned: {'id': '8168adb4-7c32-4586-91f4-80aff9d17299', 'discogs_id': None, 'title': 'TEST_B30_8802b0_Reality_Album', 'artist': 'TEST_B30_8802b0_Artist', 'cover_url': None, 'year': 2024, 'format': 'Vinyl', 'notes': None, 'color_variant': None, 'user_id': '63dcf386-b4aa-4061-9333-99adc0a770bd', 'created_at': '2026-03-09T20:48:37.430398+00:00', 'spin_count': 0} E assert None == 'Limited Edition Blue Marble'

testcase.name: test_reality_vs_dreaming_mode_difference
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_block30_context_add_button.py:243: in test_reality_vs_dreaming_mode_difference assert reality_record["color_variant"] == "Red Splatter" E AssertionError: assert None == 'Red Splatter'
